rulings.Case Title: ANDREA STEINER VS. BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 29, 2014, line 1. Defendants' Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint Sustained in part and overruled in part as follows: (1) Demurrer to the Third Cause of Action for Negligence is Sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to allege facts showing that Defendant owed her a duty; (2) Demurrer to the Fourth Cause of Action for Violation of FDCPA is Overruled. Defendant is a "debt collector" by its own representation and Second Amended Complaint contains sufficient allegations showing Defendant's alleged acts are debt collection activity; (3) Demurrer to the Sixth Cause of Action for Slander of Title is Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege non-privileged publication serving as the basis of a Slander of Title claim. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SOUTH COUNTY BANK, N.A. VS. FIRST-CITIZENS BANK & TRUST COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 29, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT PACIFIC COAST BANKERS' BANCSHARES DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff failed to allege any actionable breach of contract by the moving defendant. See ex. 1 to Second Amended Complaint Paragraph 11 and 18. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEY RUSSELL VS. BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 29, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., and HSBC BANK USA, N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR THE HOLDERS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to February 5, 2014 per stipulation and order. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than January 29, 014 by 4 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRANDON S. KAPLAN VS. MANUELA ESTEVA MARTINEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 29, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT MANUELA MARTINEZ, MARIO MARTINEZ, ELIZABETH MARTINEZ and IVAN GARCIA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege landlord-tenant relationship. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MILTON LEE et al VS. ZHI KIANG XIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Req For Production Of Docs; Notice
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 29, 2014, line 7. PLAINTIFF MILTON LEE and YOCK LEE's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents Hearing Required. Parties are ordered to appear at 9:00 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts. Parties are to report to the Court of their progress at 9:30 a.m = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MUSTANICH FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. ALBERT NORTHCUTT et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 29, 2014, line 5. PLAINTIFF MUSTANICH FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED. Plaintiff shifted burden. Defendant provided evidence creating a triable issue of fact re: maintaining an environment that promoted fleas, bedbugs, and rodents, and by obstructing pest extermination efforts. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DON LEVISON VS. KEVIN BARNARD et al

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 29, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT TARYN BARNARD'S Motion For Issue, Evidence And/Or Terminating Sanctions For Pltaintiff's Failure To Obey Court Order Re Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions Continued to February 13, 2014 pending resolution of Plaintiff's writ. Plaintiff's Peremptory Challenge is DENIED, motion fro terminating sanctions is based on the honorable Ronald Evans Quidahcay's January 14, 2014 order. = (501/REQ)
